creator: draco@marino.st
text:
ansible can't fetched currently, there something misconfigured with the master_site web server.
http://pointyhat.freebsd.org/errorlogs/i386-errorlogs/e.9.20130610065028.pointyhat/ansible-1.1.log

=> Attempting to fetch http://ansible.cc/releases/ansible-1.1.tar.gz
fetch: http://ansible.cc/releases/ansible-1.1.tar.gz: Internal Server Error
=> Attempting to fetch ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/ansible-1.1.tar.gz
fetch: ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/ansible-1.1.tar.gz: File unavailable (e.g., file not found, no access)
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this

Fix: 

copy distfile to FreeBSD
Perhaps also notify ancible.cc of the problem
